services.title: Damp Proofing Treatments
services.body: Professional damp proof membrane installation and chemical treatments.

services.title: Mould Removal
services.body: Safe removal of mould with anti-fungal solutions.

services.title: Moisture Control
services.body: Installation of ventilation systems to control moisture levels.

services.title: Plaster Replacement
services.body: Replacement and repair of damaged plaster due to dampness.

services.title: Basement Waterproofing
services.body: Specialised waterproofing solutions for basements and cellars.

services.title: Damp Surveys
services.body: Comprehensive damp surveys to identify the source of dampness.

faqs.a: Yes, we provide complimentary damp surveys to assess the issue.
Treatment duration varies based on severity; typically completed within a few days.
Yes, we offer guarantees on our work to ensure satisfaction and effectiveness.

faqs.q: Can you handle emergency damp issues?
faqs.a: Absolutely, we respond quickly to emergencies to prevent further damage.
